name: Stan's Magic Museum: Olympian Trouble
short_description: A great new Match-3 game from "eFunsoft Games"! Help a lighthearted, comedic story of a modern-day museum guard dealing with the gods and goddesses of Greek mythology. Fun match-3 puzzles let you test your skills and use a variety of tools and collect bonusses to clear each challenge.
detailed_description:
A great new Match-3 game from "eFunsoft Games"! Stan is just an average guy working a late-night shift as a guard at the local museum. It can be a dull job, but he finds ways to pass the time. Even now, one day away from the museum’s grand opening, he doesn’t expect anything to happen.

But when he knocks down a strange tablet the museum had on display, all of the museum’s artifacts are pulled into a mysterious portal. This is a catastrophe, especially so close to the grand opening… and he knows who will be blamed.

To save his job and the museum, Stan has no choice but to plunge into the portal… only to find himself in a world of mythology. If he wants the museum’s artifacts back, he’ll need to contend with the gods themselves.

Features: 

- A lighthearted, comedic story of a modern-day museum guard dealing with the gods and goddesses of Greek mythology.

- Five chapters follow Stan’s quest to reclaim the lost artifacts, with twenty upgrades as you retrieve each one.

- Fun match-3 puzzles let you test your skills and use a variety of tools to clear each challenge.

- New mysteries and wonders await on this journey to save the museum before its grand opening.
